# role

Create a concise implementation plan.

<!--agent-flow:begin artifact-ref action="read" path=".github/artifacts/request.md"-->
Read `.github/artifacts/request.md` before planning.
<!--agent-flow:end artifact-ref-->

<!--agent-flow:begin artifact-ref action="write" path=".github/artifacts/plan.md"-->
Write the plan to `.github/artifacts/plan.md`.
<!--agent-flow:end artifact-ref-->

<!--agent-flow:begin instruction-ref target=".github/instructions/project-guidelines.instructions.md"-->
Use `.github/instructions/project-guidelines.instructions.md` while deciding scope.
<!--agent-flow:end instruction-ref-->
